reviews.review_description:
We gave this a 7 at launch. Superbright's tireless post-release work has transformed it into one of the best games on Quest, full stop. The archery is sublime: quick, rewarding, with subtlety for experienced players. Slowly creeping along a balustrade, dodging arrows and lining up headshots is genuinely one of gaming's greatest pleasures. 

The setting channels Dante and Milton rather than heavy metal album covers, with cathedral spires jutting impossibly from floating platforms. Procedurally generated levels that actually feel rewarding when you die, thanks to ingenious achievement meters and score feedback. 

The roguelike loop is more akin to Beat Saber in its moreishness. A few niggles remain: boss battles aren't quite polished enough, and those ghostly specters can advance through scenery unfairly. 

On Quest 2, the visual upgrades are cumulatively substantial, with new fog layers and distant architecture that really enhance the atmosphere. An essential system seller. For the full review, search YouTube for 6DOF Reviews In Death: Unchained.

This game, by itself, makes the headset purchase worth it. I am totally serious. I could play this game forever. It is endless. It never gets boring. It is always different. It is gorgeous and addictive. Best VR game I have ever played, by a mile.

This game was a tough sell for me, I’m not the easiest to please, but after trying it once and feeling the burn in my arms holding up the bow & arrow for so long, I wanted to keep going, try harder, and make it further. Now this is my go to, and while I am still buying many of the other games, I continue to easily put them down and come right back to this one.

Super addictive!  I've always had a yearning for a good bow game since playing lots of Assassin Creed and this game scratches all the itches.  Once you get a good flow going, it's real easy to zone in and get lots of head shots, and increase your accurracy.  Loads of arrows to earn/learn.  Difficult at first but now i can play for hours on one run!  So far, best game yet!

My daughter and I play this game every night. She’s way better than me though. We got a meta quest 3 for Christmas and I bought a lot of games like behemoth, assassin’s creed etc but this is the game we keep returning to . It’s so much fun and easy to take turns on. 
I’ve seen a few negative reviews on the company not doing any updates or expanding the game. Which is a shame. But for now we’re enjoying it.

reviews.review_title: Great game but i want a sword too..
reviews.review_description:
Bug : an amulet spawned 3 meter up in the air, making it impossible to reach 😓

The good: bow and arrow is freaking cool and works really well. 

Crossbow not to much, cant hit anything and its slow to charge.

For chose encounters it would be REALLY nice to draw a sword. Eg when shield is active, the right hand should become a sword.

So far i really enjoy this game !

With Good Repetitive Gameplay Loop

Only Negative Boss area Insane Difficulty

I have put hours into this game while I was screening it for my kids. Why do you have naked baby paintings? I had to remove it from the headset. Please take the naked baby paintings out and I’ll reinstall.
I love this game! I get vertigo on many games that are VR but I can play this game until I have to recharge!  Very fun, occasional jump scares and a good arm workout!
The whole family is hooked on this one!  No one even plays the other games anymore

reviews.review_title: To the people that gave it one star.
reviews.review_description: Git gud!!!! Seriously though the people who gave this game one star are either bad, crazy, it's not their type of game or their liars. This game fantastic I would recommend. Also this game is very good for your shoulder blades they will hurt so much on siege of heaven.

reviews.review_title: Great game, just dont expect more update
reviews.review_description:
My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

This is one of the greatest games ever created in VR! You guys could have taken this game to the moon! Why did you all give up on such a great game? It's still 5 stars and my review will reflect that when/if you come back.

reviews.review_title: In Death:Unchained, or Chained In Death?
reviews.review_description:
5 star game, 1 star developer. 
This game is actually one of my all time faves, it has great mechanics and endless replayability.

Unfortunately the devs seem to have given up and there are no more seasons, no more tournaments and no more updates. Despite them announcing on multiple occasions an update was coming. (they never came).
Missing all that takes away a great deal of value from the game. Even the discounted price is a bit steep for it now.

I checked some archery games and this one is really the best regarding the handling. After some practice it is really easy to handle. But one thing is too easy to handle: the teleport-shard on the fingerbutton. I often activate it by accident, when having hectic fights. Sometimes i hit the button with my body, sometimes i hit it with the finger when holden tighter to the controller. An option to remove the teleport from the button would be very good. The teleport with the arrow is brilliant. This is the best movement possibility, i could think of. Much better that moving with the stick. No motion sickness when using the arrows to teleport. Great game :)

reviews.review_title: How is this game not coop?
reviews.review_description: This game is one of the best, but needs a coop mode, at least for the Gate Defense mode.
I think it's great 👍

As everyone says and knows for years already:  the game is fantastic and addicting.. Playing it for 5 years straight now... But the devs... Holy S.

They genuinely don't care anymore and just let the game sell.
The leaderboard is genuinely the only thing changing every few months.(just a reset..) 
The last q3 update was and will probably be last update for this game, and it needs quite the attention.
As a long time player, I could make a 20-30 points list of issues.
Oh wait, I did via Mail and official subreddit post a year ago 👀☠️

I'm incredibly disappointed in the devs and their super lazy attitude towards the game and players.
It's my favorite VR game
Great game. Reminds of Diablo. Great tutorial. Hopefully this game will just keep getting better.

Still one of the greatest games we have in VR, which is being left to wither on the vine, due to a completely unresponsive development team.

No updates, no additional content, and no attempts to make good on stated commitments (in the last 12 months). Seasonal play used to refresh the leaderboards has now been abandoned (locking cosmetic items away from many players) and bugs are going unaddressed.

Statements have been made by Superbright over the last six months, with zero follow through. 

Fix, or sunset your game so players know what is going on please.

.
Of all the games I’ve played on my horizon+ subscription, this is by far the best. Keeps me coming back for more. The atmosphere is insanely good coupled with the low-key soundtracks.
Sucks
Terrible gameplay, unoriginal ideas with even worst mechanics

I don’t know if this is an action game or a horror game, I’m killing a guard then I turn around to see a zombie running at me from four feet away. This is a good game but make it so you don’t have to move with your bow and arrow, make it so that there’s a setting to move with your joystick.

Either make it so we can start from Purgatory II or Desolation II, it's getting redundant having to start at the Abyss EVERY SINGLE TIME to get there.  Also,  knights repeatedly getting shot in the face shouldn't have arrows just pass through them, and I'm hit at LEAST twice per game through a WALL. Game could be a 5 all day,  but 1 is what you get until you guys fix the obvious problems. Be a lot more interesting too if it were multiplayer.. just saying. Also,  you have HUNDREDS of 1 star reviews,  that magical 4.7 rating you're flashing to everyone is a load of crap.
Pretty good gameplay. Improvement in character movement and diversity in background music required

Updated review: It's a shame that the devs seem to have abanded this awesome game.
No more seasons, no more updated leaderboards, no keeping stated promises made in the last few months. No response to player outreach. No response to whether they intend to continue support of this game. Consider carefully if you want to purchase a seemingly abandoned game.

Original review: Visually stunning, beautiful music, satisfying sound effects, and very challenging, but the rewards from achievements keep you engaged.  Incredible replay-ability. The feeling of accomplishment when you make progress will keep you coming back.  Best game purchase ever! Run, don't walk, to purchase this game!

reviews.review_title: I luv luv luv this game
reviews.review_description: I’m an out of shape mom (43) and at first I wasn’t understanding this game or happy, but I gave it a few days and now it’s my favorite!!! Luv this game!!

Ive probably spent more time on this game than any other... once you tune in the controls are fully intuitive, the levels are great and the theme is awesome.

Sadly, it seems to have been dropped by the dev of any further support since 18 months ago or so.  A crying shame and needs a sequel to consume my time if they're discarding this version.
No other game comes close in both game play and functionality.

reviews.review_title: If it's on Sale get it
reviews.review_description: This has to be one of the best looking games on quest 3 the Archery is pretty fun replayablity value is off the charts i haven't played much but i can tell i'm going to put a lot of hours in this.

reviews.review_title: Pretty good game, repetitive but fun.
reviews.review_description:
Note that I am not at all far into the game and still die very often.
The game is very fun and seated friendly but can hurt due to how much you have to pull back the string on a bow or crossbow, not having any other weapons.
The features are very beginner friendly, not having to really grab anything, changing ammo type and tool with a button press etcetera.
The combat is pretty hard but easy to get used to, more challenging.
The smooth movement could be improved, due to it being very slow and forcing you to use the teleport arrows. I also think the tutorial can be improved so you don't have to die 100000 times to learn how to fight newer enemies.

reviews.review_title: Rinse and repeat, just a wave shooter
reviews.review_description: Game was ok at first then found out scenery remains the same and there is no new layout of maps or new areas like forest or something anything u play in the same area with no progression or progress to new areas , map is small too odd game to me. So ur not moving forward in this game to new areas it's kinda like a corn maze u get to the end then start over do the same thing again etc etc .no story no missions, just a wave shooter . If u like whack a mole games u might like this lol

reviews.review_title: Great old game! Too bad it's abandoned😢
reviews.review_description:
The bow mechanic in this game is great and I love it! It's just a shame I can't take my mythical hammer with me😉
Unfortunately there are a lot of bugs in the game environment that can be exploited to easily defeat bosses/farm points and that probably no one will fix😣
Hey Dev I was looking forward to finally unlocking my pink gloves after 1000 hours of playing but I can't because the season never ends?😥😪😭

Doom with a bow. Overall concept is grounded but play through gets difficult quickly and multiplayer isn’t available. Haven’t been in it long enough to feel the pain of the one star reviews but if I had sank hours into this game I’m sure I’d feel the same
Love this game. Bosses are difficult but the bow and arrow is super crisp! Its great!
I played this game for the first time and ended up playing for multiple hours, beware you’ll never play anything else!

I play this game a lot, but continue to be frustrated.  Maybe I am inept, but it is so difficult it is very hard to achieve higher levels.  I am not quite sure why they made it so hard and difficult.  I will continue to try and make headway, but my patience is running thin.
There's been no updates since summer 2024. Can't get any new cosmetics. Shame on the developer, Superbright.

Great fun. Really enjoy how every attempt is a different configuration.  What initially seems impossible at fist becomes easier as you develop skills and tactics.
Only flaws are occasional small gaps in the building elements, and characters who move through each other.
This has been my go to vr game for ages now what can i say its scary action packed and a lot of fun just buy it you wont be disapointed by far the best archary game out there
So far I'm really enjoying this game. Good graphics and exciting action. The farther you get, the harder it gets. I felt it was worth the sale price.

I bought and loved the OG PC version.  Yes, it has better graphics. I always told myself “one day I’ll beat this.” I never did. Never even got “gud”. 

So I know the lore how this is a new developer who has built upon the old game and brought it to standalone. And they have done a stellar job. This is a very good game like the first. I even got gud a pittle, I put some time into it. 

Nitpick, this game is rarely on sale. I’ve played on Horizon+ but I will not have that forever. So whenever that ends so will my occasional score chasing. Unless there is a sale. I bought the game once already.

reviews.review_title: Keeps calling you back for another go...
reviews.review_description:
This is the first real 'roguelite' I've played on my Quest 3 which for a short time, took me a bit of getting used to. Basically, if you die in the game, it's a 'perma-death'. You start right from the beginning but any unlockable achievements you gained from previous game run-throughs such as new types of arrows, extra health, or tougher classes of enemies will also apply. Hence the name of the game, I guess. You have to kick the bucket at some point to progress.

After pumping quite a few hours into the game, I finally managed to beat the last boss which was tough. The game is effectively on an endless loop so you keep racking up points until you croak. There is also a league table so you can see how you compare against other players across the globe. However, the game at the moment displays Summer 2024 season, so I don't know if the devs have just abandoned the game now?

The bow mechanics do feel good and satisfying in this game. It's always great when you manage to nail a headshot from quite some distance away. There are 3 modes of movement; teleportation arrows for long distance jumps, teleportation shards for quick dodging, and slow walking with the thumb stick. You can also bring up a shield for attacks and use it as a weak melee weapon to knock close enemies back.

This does have Quest 3 graphics upgrades. Parts of the game do look really good. The resolution is decent. But some textures on occasions look low quality.

Overall, this is a solid game. I rarely award 5 stars to any title. It's easy to pick up and play once you have the hang of the basic mechanics but it's the type that is also difficult to master. There's no real story or deep concept to the game but I found myself employing various strategies. If you go in guns or bows blazing, you can find yourself overrun very quickly by 20+ enemies at once. I can understand why some folks won't take to this game but I found it quite addictive once I got used to the roguelite gameplay.
if u have black screen bug disable internet and reopen game

This game is brilliant in that it’s easy enough to get started but difficult enough not to be mastered. 

It keeps drawing you back in with achievements to unlock, levels to pursue, and leaderboards to climb. 

It never gets old and the speed of progressing may be too slow for some people who want to complete games quickly and move on to the next, but I think it is timed perfectly. 

After hundreds of hours, I still have 30% of achievements to unlock, which keeps me motivated.

SuperBright listens to the community and continually makes improvements.

This is this first and only review I have done because this game is that good!

reviews.review_title: Good game, some weird design choices
reviews.review_description: I really like this game and have a good bit of fun with it. However, I do think the sound design needs work. Since you have to move around by shooting, you can't always look at your enemies. Better audio queues would be great. Also for some reason the devs decided that it would be fun to add ghosts (sometimes packs of +5) that can fly through walls and also can't be hit, but only die after they hit you. This ruins sessions for me, it's so incredibly unfun a mechanic. Rethink your concept of "punishing difficulty".

Fantastic, addictive ,frustrating ,awesome. This game is what vr games should be. I dont want to solve puzzles, make weapons, find keys etc. I want to escape to an environment and just have fun shooting,running away, and giving my brain a rest. This game checks all the boxes
 Thank you developers.  Looking forward to checking out your games/ updates

Omg Desolation is incredible. This is the only game I have been playing..This game is the gold standard for Occulus  games
It's really fun to play such a wonderful game. Real experience of VR. Recommended to play.

Could use a better or more detailed storyline (possibly add some cutscenes or something), but the gameplay itself is absolutely amazing I love it. Would he pretty cool if there was a co-op or pvp mode

… playing the game for 2 1/2 years … and there are so many ways to play the game … still the best game for me for VR
… it would be fantastic if they could do a multiplayer mode into game

reviews.review_title: Good for a roguelike, limited in depth
reviews.review_description:
I like the gameplay.  I love the art style.  I love the soundtrack.

However, the lack of story content and repetitive nature of the game makes the game experience feel a bit limited in depth of experience for me as a player.

There are a lot of VR games available that provide an experience with a lot less repetition and a lot more story content and depth of experience for the price, so I don't think this game deserves any more than 4 stars.

I really appreciate the easy modes and surprisingly after a while my aim has improved. The game is also a great way to exercise, with all the bow pulling. I wish the instructions were clearer though. I still don't know how to switch arrows or use the various items. Maybe a pop up after you select an item to guide the user? Could be made optional in settings so it does not appear every time..

Since getting a quest 3 over a year ago, I have still played this game more than any other.

Tips for others:
Pause menu in settings, you can change to use joysticks to move. Hold B while grabbing bow string and pull back and release to fire movement arrow. Use main trigger to fire normal arrow. Just putting up your shield doesn't block. You actually have to hold your shield in the way of incoming attack. 

This is a hardcore game, where death is over and over again. That's the point. The more you do, the farther you get, the more you unlock to help you, while also the more difficult enemies you end up with.

You won't beat the first boss right away. You'll eventually get a perk to make him have half health, and unlock special arrows. Unload every special on him.

I've beaten every level many times and all bosses, except the Final Boss. Still can't win the final fight. 

Scary, fun, good arm workout when using bow, more relaxing with crossbow. Panick shooting really gets you to push your arms to the limit.

Loving the game so far: fun, immersive, and full of promise! Playing via Horizon+ and it’s already on my wishlist.

That said, the crossbow feels oddly fast and a bit out of place. It’s a small thing, but it shows there’s still room for polish and balancing in some areas.

If the devs keep refining it like this, I’ll definitely grab it the moment a good sale hits. Great job overall;  looking forward to what’s next! 🔥

It took me a while to get the hang of this game but now I love it. If you’re struggling to get past certain parts it’s probably because you don’t have the right arrows yet I suggest focusing on achievements.   ￼
Best archery game on quest. Think I even like it better than Elvin Assassin, which has been my favourite for ages.

First of all, had the same bug as the 2 other reviews I've saw and the devs had no update for them. It happened during the tutorial where after you shoot the 3 enemies there's literally nothing you can do.

Shooting an arrow won't let you walk anywhere, and even skipping the tutorial would still make you stuck in that other background...!

reviews.review_title: A great introduction to Mate Quest gamin
reviews.review_description: I’ve just started playing this game and find it very absorbing, fantastic graphics and great fun for a novice gamer.

reviews.review_title: Still the best bow game out there!!
reviews.review_description: Great game play. Extremely accurate, smooth, and immersive. The physics are spot on and the movement controllers are intuitive. Took some practice to hone my skills, but now I can consistently hit very long shots, which is soooo satisfying! Love love this game!
You have to teleport with the bow instead of walking

reviews.review_title: See what it’s like to be Legolas in LOTR
reviews.review_description:
Let me start by saying that I am super impressed with the constant updates the developers have been doing. It’s great to see a company care so much and really keep the pulse of their fans. Well done Superbrite!!!

What a game. This game is so much fun. The visuals in the castle are breathe taking. The game play is a blast. Once you get the controls down it’s a whole lot of fun. They aren’t hard to learn. I just made it to Anakim the Abominable on level one. He’s a big boy that doesn’t go down easily. Can’t wait to take him out and see what’s next. You can hide behind walls to block arrows coming at you and you peak around and rip a couple arrows like a sniper from Medieval days. The guards are big boys and require a few arrows to take them out. The more I play this game the more I want to explore and shoot things with my bow. The accuracy of the bow and arrow system is very impressive. I found that if I use my established mark on my jaw like a normal bow I am way more accurate. If you are a fan of Medieval times or the LOTR and wondered what it would be like to live those adventures, GET THIS GAME!!!

I now have about 10hrs into this game and it only gets harder. The more you accomplish, the nastier the enemies get. Literally as I have gotten better the game has gotten tougher. I love this game but boy is it challenging. Great replay value!
I just hate the teleport movement it should be optional other than that it’s totally worth it
Just another update related a bit graphic and multiplayer. Will make that grateful 🙏

Last Stand is GREAT! I would give it 5 stars. With practice it is possible to get through all the levels. The others are more or less frustrating. Above all, Paradise lost is really about luck, because arrows rain down from everywhere, and you don't necessarily hear the enemy's voice at all. They appear suddenly from everywhere and it's just about luck that you survive to the end. I've made it through it, but often the gameplay is reduced to a few minutes when you die and have to start over again. The game should be changed a bit. You can't even escape and arrows rain down on your back even when you can't see them. They shoot from hundreds of meters away and from a small gap, even if you think you're in cover

Stuck in tutorial. Won't let me move forward after using the burning arrows on the scarecrows. Just stuck. I can look around, but it won't let me progress. New Meta Quest 3 user. I was excited but now I feel like I wasted my money. Boo. 💀💀

reviews.review_title: If only you could walk or run
reviews.review_description: This title would get a five star rating if you could walk or run.  Developers please take note.

Quite new to VR, this is only the second game I'm playing and I must say,  it is great.
I would love to be able to use more weapons but maybe it is later in game,  we shall see!
Must try anyway!

reviews.review_title: I hate myself for loving this game.
reviews.review_description: Okay, here it is. This game rewards you for dying. You get better arrows and perks the more you die, which is sort of a trade-off for dying so often. And the further along you get, the tougher the game gets. I’m only 22% into it and now have monks that shoot five arrows at a time. I die so often I can’t believe I haven’t deleted it yet. And yet I play it almost every day. I must hate myself by playing this again and again. Maybe so, but  **** this game is fun!
Good game I prefer the siege/horde mode rather than the campaign but it would be 5 stars if it had a co-op mode for the siege/horde mode!! Devs get on it please!!!
The game is very difficult, but so much fun to play. This is a must buy for anyone with a meta quest. Keep at it, and enjoy. You won't regret it.

All the other games in my quest 3 (And there is a lot).  I keep coming back to this one when I’m bored.  It’s easy to play, yet challenging…. Graphics are fantastic, has some scare content as well as the feel good sniper shot, game runs smooth and plenty of hours of levels.…. I’m hoping there will be another in the future, not that I’ve finished this one yet 😁
I don’t know why game has so many positive reviews but this is very boring and not fun at all

This is my #1 game on VR! Classic FPS Dungeon Crawler with high replay ability. Another one I always come back to. The vibe/aura of this game is amazing! And each round leaves you with wanting more, proving your skills with a bow and arrow. The biggest challenge is your achievements and unlocking benefits or different bows and shields and more challenging areas. This is a must have on any VR device!
I love this game personally I’m not a huge midevil fan but this game is so fun it can be frustrating but this is the game that I always go back to. Definitely worth getting in my opinion

reviews.review_title: Hoping for a MP experience one day!
reviews.review_description:
I keep coming back to this addictive gorgeous classic, and can’t help but wonder if there’s something in the works that will one day allow me and my little brother (on different coasts) to tackle this world in co-op or deathmatch sniper mode!

With that said, take my five stars any dang way! You guys “get” VR!

reviews.review_title: More of a request than a review
reviews.review_description:
I started this yesterday. Went through the tutorial and "killed" all the scarecrows. But after that I could not move out teleport. I have looked at all of the vids on YouTube and know you can move but I am at a lost as to how to do this. 
Any help please
Excellent

reviews.review_title: The best VR game there is
reviews.review_description:
I plan to quit meta+ but this is the only game I can buy with my money. 

Immersive and very comfortable for people like me who suffer from motion sickness. 

If you have to play or buy only one game ever, this should be it.
